column4: Admin proposal list and detail manual verification
column5:
Manual UI + log inspection:
1. In a browser, login as an enabled admin
2. In the browser, open /admin/proposals
3. In the browser, open one proposal detail page from the list
4. Confirm optional submitter information appears only on administrator screens
5. Confirm submitter contact and full proposal body are shown on the administrator detail screen only
6. Inspect application logs from the same test run
7. Confirm proposal body and submitter information are not written to app logs
column6: Admin read screens are reachable only by an enabled admin and display approved administrator fields
